project.name: Relay
project.description: A focused release-feedback product that turns scattered reactions into one clear next decision.
project.author: Example Studio

data.headline: Know what changed, what mattered, and what to do next.
data.proof: Relay collects structured reactions after each release and converts them into a visible decision trail for product teams.

features.title: Focused prompts
features.description: Ask the smallest useful question while the release is still fresh in everyone’s mind.

features.title: Visible patterns
features.description: Group repeated signals without losing the original comments or their context.

features.title: Decision history
features.description: Record what changed next so feedback becomes part of the product memory.

steps.title: Publish
steps.description: Connect a release or milestone to one short feedback request.

steps.title: Review
steps.description: See themes, disagreements, and unanswered questions in one place.

steps.title: Decide
steps.description: Turn the useful signal into an explicit next action and owner.

data.closingTitle: Make every release teach the next one.
data.closingBody: Start with a single team and one active project.
